HeroSection.title: The Future of Payments, Today.
HeroSection.description: Everpay provides seamless, secure, and scalable payment solutions for businesses of all sizes. Empower your growth with our innovative technology.

FeaturesSection.title: Why Choose Everpay?
FeaturesSection.description: Our platform is built to help your business thrive in the digital economy.
FeaturesSection.feature1Description: Accept payments from anywhere in the world, in any currency.
FeaturesSection.feature2Description: Protect your transactions with state-of-the-art fraud prevention.
FeaturesSection.feature3Description: Easily integrate our APIs with your existing systems.
FeaturesSection.feature4Description: Grow your business without worrying about payment infrastructure.
FeaturesSection.feature5Description: Our dedicated team is always here to help you succeed.
FeaturesSection.feature6Description: Transparent and affordable rates with no hidden fees.

StatsSection.title: Trusted by Businesses Worldwide
StatsSection.description: Join thousands of satisfied merchants who rely on Everpay for their payment needs.

PaymentPartnersSection.title: Our Payment Partners
PaymentPartnersSection.description: We collaborate with leading payment networks to ensure broad acceptance and reliability.

CheckoutProtectionSection.title: Secure Checkout & Fraud Protection
CheckoutProtectionSection.description: Ensure every transaction is safe and secure with Everpay's advanced fraud detection and prevention tools.
CheckoutProtectionSection.feature1Description: Identify and block suspicious transactions instantly.
CheckoutProtectionSection.feature2Description: Maintain the highest security standards for card data.
CheckoutProtectionSection.feature3Description: Add an extra layer of security for online credit and debit card transactions.
CheckoutProtectionSection.feature4Description: Minimize disputes and protect your revenue.

BusinessTypesSection.title: Solutions for Every Business Type
BusinessTypesSection.description: Whether you're a startup or an enterprise, Everpay has tailored solutions to meet your unique payment needs.
BusinessTypesSection.ecommerceDescription: Seamless online payment processing for your e-commerce store.
BusinessTypesSection.retailDescription: Modernize your in-store payments with our versatile POS solutions.
BusinessTypesSection.marketplaceDescription: Manage complex payment flows for multi-vendor platforms.
BusinessTypesSection.saasDescription: Automate recurring billing and subscription management.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Payments?
cta.description: Join Everpay today and experience the future of secure and efficient transactions.

ContactPage.title: Contact Us
ContactPage.description: Have questions or need assistance? Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
